rows:
Type
Clock Synchronization Server (N_Port
Login only)
Other FC_Ports (N_Port Login only)
Fabric (FLOGI LS_ACC only)
Meaning if bit set to one

The Clock Synchronization Server is capable of generating
clock synchronization Primitive Signals (see FC-FS-2).

The FC_Port is capable of receiving the clock synchronization
Primitive Signals (see FC-FS-2) and acting upon them.

The Fabric is capable of receiving the clock synchronization
Primitive Signals (see FC-FS-2) and acting upon them.
